TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_alan_khaw_na_’tayal, title = alan_khaw_na_’tayal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/alan_khaw_na_’tayal} }

S.FORM: alan khaw na 'tayal aring sraral mutuw pmhyun Tayal ka mutuw naha' galan khaw hya' ga, mluw squ qqyanux naha' mmuhi' sa ruma' tayal sa ggalan naha' ttngasal han, babaw nya' mwah qu Gipun lga, sgsugun na Gipun maha qiri' mmuhi' sa labing ru blhuy, ru galun na Gipun sbaziy naha' tay Gipun maha ruw, aring kya qu lawkah muhi' kya kwara' qu qalang na Tayal qani. suruw na Gipun lga, yaqu nuka' na kgiy squ bblhuy qu spyang bzirun na Plmukan galan khaw na Tayal hya' ha, yalaw gi wayal t'rgun tmutu' na Plmukan kwara' qqhuniq rgyax tayal lru, ki'a naha' skngungu' ppsluhiy kwara' rhzyal rgrgyax lru, sgin na aki' ta' pkmtasiq kwara' rhzyal Taywan maha lru, aring 45 kawas thayluw lqu sglaing naha' mmuhi' qayparung Gipun la, nanu' ktan kya na Tayal lruw, yasa siy ppmuhi' qayparung kwara' qu Tayal kya la. kwara' qani hya' ga kahul sa bbzirun na Plmukan qu spmuhi' naha' qani hya'. tayhuk 60 kawas thayluw lga, wal si 'nxal yaqih kwara' qu bbziran khkhaw tayal ka rruma' ru qayparung ru kwara' ka bblhuy ru nuka' uzi lruw, minusa' sayqabu' hugal kwara' qu mmrkyas tayal kruma', ga musa' muhi' tqinuw rgyax kruma' qu tayal hya' ha, ga ini' tayhuk mawpuw kawas lga, mngaygyut mwah mmuhi' baybway qhuniq ka nasi', qzimux, ru bnubuw qani lga, ini' qbsyaq uzi, ruw iyugun naha' sa qapu' Gipun la, babaw niya' lga, pzyux iyal qu muhi' sa baybway lru, mkura' sa muhi' rramat qu maki' tay rgyax la, ruw nanu' ya'qani qu nyuw naha' lhingan mlahang na' misuw qani la.

alan khaw na 'tayal aring sraral mutuw pmhyun Tayal ka mutuw naha' galan khaw hya' ga, mluw squ qqyanux naha' mmuhi' sa ruma' tayal sa ggalan naha' ttngasal han, babaw nya' mwah qu Gipun lga, sgsugun na Gipun maha qiri' mmuhi' sa labing ru blhuy, ru galun na Gipun sbaziy naha' tay Gipun maha ruw, aring kya qu lawkah muhi' kya kwara' qu qalang na Tayal qani. suruw na Gipun lga, yaqu nuka' na kgiy squ bblhuy qu spyang bzirun na Plmukan galan khaw na Tayal hya' ha, yalaw gi wayal t'rgun tmutu' na Plmukan kwara' qqhuniq rgyax tayal lru, ki'a naha' skngungu' ppsluhiy kwara' rhzyal rgrgyax lru, sgin na aki' ta' pkmtasiq kwara' rhzyal Taywan maha lru, aring 45 kawas thayluw lqu sglaing naha' mmuhi' qayparung Gipun la, nanu' ktan kya na Tayal lruw, yasa siy ppmuhi' qayparung kwara' qu Tayal kya la. kwara' qani hya' ga kahul sa bbzirun na Plmukan qu spmuhi' naha' qani hya'. tayhuk 60 kawas thayluw lga, wal si 'nxal yaqih kwara' qu bbziran khkhaw tayal ka rruma' ru qayparung ru kwara' ka bblhuy ru nuka' uzi lruw, minusa' sayqabu' hugal kwara' qu mmrkyas tayal kruma', ga musa' muhi' tqinuw rgyax kruma' qu tayal hya' ha, ga ini' tayhuk mawpuw kawas lga, mngaygyut mwah mmuhi' baybway qhuniq ka nasi', qzimux, ru bnubuw qani lga, ini' qbsyaq uzi, ruw iyugun naha' sa qapu' Gipun la, babaw niya' lga, pzyux iyal qu muhi' sa baybway lru, mkura' sa muhi' rramat qu maki' tay rgyax la, ruw nanu' ya'qani qu nyuw naha' lhingan mlahang na' misuw qani la.
S.PHON: alan kħaw na ʔtajal ariŋ s~ɕraral mutuw pmħjun tajal ka mutuw naħaʔ ɣalan kħaw ħjaʔ ɣa, mluw s~ɕqu qqjanux naħaʔ mmuħiʔ s~ɕa rumaʔ tajal s~ɕa ɣɣalan naħaʔ ttŋas~ɕal ħan, βaβaw njaʔ mwaħ qu ɣipun lɣa, s~ɕɣs~ɕuɣun na ɣipun maħa qiriʔ mmuħiʔ s~ɕa laβiŋ ru βlħuj, ru ɣalun na ɣipun s~ɕβazij naħaʔ taj ɣipun maħa ruw, ariŋ kja qu lawkaħ muħiʔ kja kwaraʔ qu qalaŋ na tajal qani. s~ɕuruw na ɣipun lɣa, jaqu nukaʔ na kɣij s~ɕqu ββlħuj qu s~ɕpjaŋ βzirun na plmukan ɣalan kħaw na tajal ħjaʔ ħa, jalaw ɣi wajal tʔrɣun tmutuʔ na plmukan kwaraʔ qqħuniq rɣjax tajal lru, kiʔa naħaʔ s~ɕkŋuŋuʔ pps~ɕluħij kwaraʔ rħzjal rɣrɣjax lru, s~ɕɣin na akiʔ taʔ pkmtas~ɕiq kwaraʔ rħzjal tajwan maħa lru, ariŋ ** kawas~ɕ tħajluw lqu s~ɕɣlaiŋ naħaʔ mmuħiʔ qajparuŋ ɣipun la, nanuʔ ktan kja na tajal lruw, jas~ɕa s~ɕij ppmuħiʔ qajparuŋ kwaraʔ qu tajal kja la. kwaraʔ qani ħjaʔ ɣa kaħul s~ɕa ββzirun na plmukan qu s~ɕpmuħiʔ naħaʔ qani ħjaʔ. tajħuk ** kawas~ɕ tħajluw lɣa, wal s~ɕi ʔnxal jaqiħ kwaraʔ qu ββziran kħkħaw tajal ka rrumaʔ ru qajparuŋ ru kwaraʔ ka ββlħuj ru nukaʔ uzi lruw, minus~ɕaʔ s~ɕajqaβuʔ ħuɣal kwaraʔ qu mmrkjas~ɕ tajal krumaʔ, ɣa mus~ɕaʔ muħiʔ tqinuw rɣjax krumaʔ qu tajal ħjaʔ ħa, ɣa iniʔ tajħuk mawpuw kawas~ɕ lɣa, mŋajɣjut mwaħ mmuħiʔ βajβwaj qħuniq ka nas~ɕiʔ, qzimux, ru βnuβuw qani lɣa, iniʔ qβs~ɕjaq uzi, ruw ijuɣun naħaʔ s~ɕa qapuʔ ɣipun la, βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa, pzjux ijal qu muħiʔ s~ɕa βajβwaj lru, mkuraʔ s~ɕa muħiʔ rramat qu makiʔ taj rɣjax la, ruw nanuʔ jaʔqani qu njuw naħaʔ lħiŋan mlaħaŋ naʔ mis~ɕuw qani la.
